title: vittadinia australasica var. subglabra
intro: Vittadinia australasica var. subglabra, also known as the Smooth New South Wales Daisy, is a variety of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vittadinia australasica var. subglabra are thought to include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antiviral properties. However, I couldn't find information on specific herbal preparations of this plant, so it is not recommended for use without consulting a healthcare professional.
